memories.content: Tobias is working on a new AI project, named 'myai'. He aims to integrate speech-to-text and text-to-speech capabilities.
Added a Google search function tool to the 'myai' AI project to enhance information gathering and capabilities.
Tobias wants to use Whisper as the speech-to-text model for his project 'myai'.

User decided to use Google Text-to-Speech for TTS due to its high-quality neural voices, wide language support, and easy integration. They chose to pair it with OpenAI Whisper for speech-to-text to leverage the best of both services. The decision was based on the combined quality, features, and compatibility of these tools for their needs.
Tobias used to make YouTube videos, now enjoys coding and occasionally doing music production.
